title: MSW (Mock Service Worker)
body:
## Definition

**MSW** intercepts network requests in tests and development with realistic HTTP handlers — no real API needed.

## Why it exists

Test components that fetch without brittle `fetch` mocks; same handlers in dev and test.

## How it works

Define `rest.get("/api/user", () => res(ctx.json(user)))`. Browser uses Service Worker; Node uses interceptors.

## In practice

Pair with RTL for integration tests; share handlers with Storybook optional.
bodyLinked:
## Definition

**[MSW](concept:msw)** intercepts network requests in tests and development with realistic HTTP handlers — no real API needed.

## Why it exists

Test components that [fetch](concept:fetch) without brittle [fetch](concept:fetch) mocks; same handlers in dev and test.

## How it works

Define `rest.get("/api/user", () => res(ctx.json(user)))`. Browser uses [Service Worker](concept:service-worker); Node uses interceptors.

## In practice

Pair with [RTL](concept:react-testing-library) for [integration tests](concept:testing-pyramid); share handlers with Storybook optional.
